title: centaurea zeybekii
intro: Centaurea zeybekii, also known as Zeybek's knapweed, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Turkey, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Centaurea zeybekii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
